sections.title: Moving House
sections.body: I've been busy recently with getting ready to move house, so my day to day schedule has been a bit all over the place.

sections.title: Languages
sections.body: For the first few months of the year I'm focusing on French, and maintaining my Japanese and Korean more passively.

sections.title: Reading
sections.body: This year I'm focusing on making reading a habit again. I'm trying to read more consistently and broadly. You can follow along on [Goodreads](https://goodreads.com/lehtia).
